title: Forebody Shock Pre-compression System (ATA 53)
description: Define the forebody geometry and shock pre-compression architecture. Peak TPS temperature: 1600+ K. Shock system feeds propulsion inlet.
notes: Waverider-derived forebody; shock trains compress inlet airflow

title: Wing Aerodynamic Configuration (ATA 57)
description: Define the wing configuration as low aspect-ratio delta/strake with lifting body blend for hypersonic and subsonic flight.
notes: Low AR delta / strake; lifting body blend for multi-regime performance

title: Combined-Cycle Propulsion System (ATA 71-78)
description: Define the combined-cycle or rocket propulsion architecture using LH2/LOX propellants spanning all trajectory phases from M 0 to 25+.
notes: Combined-cycle (air-breathing + rocket) or pure rocket; LH2/LOX

title: Thermal Protection System Architecture (ATA 51)
description: Define the metallic/CMC TPS architecture with active cooling capability. TPS receives coolant from cryogenic tanks.
notes: Metallic / CMC panels with active coolant loop fed from ATA 28 cryo tanks

title: Cryogenic Tank System (ATA 28)
description: Define the integral LH2 + LOX cryogenic tank system providing propellant for propulsion and coolant for the thermal protection system.
notes: LH2 + LOX integral structural tanks; dual role as propellant and TPS coolant source
